LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JAMES HOOVER'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED FROM NOV-15-2007 TO DEC-13-2007. PETITIONER TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS AND RESPONSE ALONG WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JAMES HOOVER'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE PRESUMPTION IN VEHICLE CODE SECTION 23152(B) APPLIES GIVEN THAT THE TEST WAS TAKEN WITHIN SEVENTY-ONE MINUTES OF THE ACCIDENT AND ARREST. BELL V. D.M.V. (1992) 11 CAL APP 4TH 304, 311. ALTHOUGH PETITIONER PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF PROBLEMS WITH THE MACHINE, THE TESTIMONY OF PETITIONER'S EXPERT CONFIRMS THAT, AT OR ABOUT THE TIME OF PETITIONER'S TEST, THE MACHINE WAS OPERATING WITHIN THE ACCEPTABLE RANGE. TO THE EXTENT IT WAS HIGH BY 0.01, PETITIONER'S TEST STILL EXCEEDED THE LEGAL RATE. RESPONDENT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JAMES HOOVER'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE PRESUMPTION IN VEHICLE CODE SECTION 23152(B) APPLIES GIVEN THAT THE TEST WAS TAKEN WITHIN SEVENTY-ONE MINUTES OF THE ACCIDENT AND ARREST. BELL V. D.M.V. (1992) 11 CAL APP 4TH 304, 311. ALTHOUGH PETITIONER PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF PROBLEMS WITH THE MACHINE, THE TESTIMONY OF PETITIONER'S EXPERT CONFIRMS THAT, AT OR ABOUT THE TIME OF PETITIONER'S TEST, THE MACHINE WAS OPERATING WITHIN THE ACCEPTABLE RANGE. TO THE EXTENT IT WAS HIGH BY 0.01, PETITIONER'S TEST STILL EXCEEDED THE LEGAL RATE. RESPONDENT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
